title: The trillion-dollar question: Is tech's massive AI spending actually working?
description: A frenzied day of earnings reports offered a glimpse at how some of the world’s biggest tech companies are doing in artificial intelligence.

title: Tech’s AI Bet: Transforming earnings and market trends
description: Major US technology companies have reported strong quarterly earnings, with artificial intelligence emerging as the central driver of both growth and investor enthusiasm. While markets remain broadly optimistic, there is a growing sense of caution as investors assess whether this AI-led expansion can be sustained over the long term. The Big Picture

title: White House against Anthropic expanding Mythos model access: report
description: The White House is opposing Anthropic's plans to expand access to its new artificial intelligence model Mythos to 120 companies, the Wall Street Journal
content:
The White House is opposing Anthropic’s plans to expand access to its new artificial intelligence model Mythos to 120 companies, the Wall Street Journal reported Wednesday.

title: Schneider Electric tops revenue forecast as it rides AI data centre wave
description: Schneider Electric narrowly beat first-quarter revenue expectations on Thursday, once again ​boosted by the global artificial intelligence data centre buildout reinforcing ‌the French group's role as one of the most sought-after suppliers.
content: Revenue in the three months through March grew 11.2% organically to 9.77 billion euros ($11.39 billion). That was a ​notch above the average consensus estimate of 9.76 billion euros, with ​10.1% organic growth expected by analysts polled by the compa... [1794 chars]

title: Military's adoption of AI seen as key to Ukraine's survival
description: Ukraine is accelerating the use of artificial intelligence to retain an edge on the battlefield, as the war with Russia enters a new technological phase.

title: Amazon beats expectations but rattles markets with massive spending
description: Despite robust results driven by cloud services and advertising, the group's shares slipped as markets questioned the scale of its capex in artificial intelligence and ce.
content: Amazon reported Q1 earnings that topped expectations, with EPS coming in at $2.78, well ahead of the $1.64 anticipated. Revenue reached $181.52bn, also exceeding forecasts set at $177.30bn. Performance was notably bolstered by Amazon Web Services, wh... [757 chars]

title: Ahmedabad Cyber Police arrest four accused of Aadhaar-based fraud of Rs 25,000
description: Ahmedabad Cyber Police have arrested four accused of an Aadhaar-based fraud of Rs 25,000. The fraudsters changed the registered mobile number with Aadhaar and used artificial intelligence (AI) for biometric authentication, DCP Lavina Sinha said.
